array.string: cd /ABSOLUTE/PATH/TO/codex-self-evolution-plugin && \ /Users/haha/hermes-agent/venv/bin/python3.11 -m codex_self_evolution.cli compile-preflight --state-dir data | tee data/scheduler/last-preflight.json && \ if grep -q '"status": "run"' data/scheduler/last-preflight.json; then \ /Users/haha/hermes-agent/venv/bin/python3.11 -m codex_self_evolution.cli compile --once --state-dir data --backend agent:opencode; \ fi
